title: Solid Tumor Immunotherapy
trial_text: Inclusion: Patients with advanced solid tumors. Exclusion: Active brain metastasis. Prior chemotherapy.

title: Breast Cancer HER2+
trial_text: Inclusion: HER2 positive breast cancer. ECOG 0-1. Exclusion: Active autoimmune disease.

title: Melanoma Phase II
trial_text: Inclusion: Stage III or IV melanoma. Exclusion: Prior treatment with PD-1 inhibitors.

title: Lung Cancer Targeted
trial_text: Inclusion: Non-small cell lung cancer with EGFR mutation. Exclusion: Uncontrolled hypertension.

title: Leukemia Trial
trial_text: Inclusion: Acute Myeloid Leukemia. Age > 18. Exclusion: Severe heart failure.
